semantic.role: Configuration entry point for the ArchSpine mirror system
responsibilities: Defines the root configuration structure for the .spine directory
Establishes the foundational settings for the mirror system

English.purpose: This document serves as the configuration entry point for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining the foundational structure and settings within the .spine directory.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for system architects and developers who need to understand the top-level configuration layout of the ArchSpine project.
key_takeaways: The document outlines the role of .spine/config.json as the primary configuration file.
It specifies responsibilities related to defining the mirror system's configuration structure.
Operational details and specific parameter values are outside the scope of this document.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是 ArchSpine 镜像系统的配置入口，定义了 .spine 目录下的基础结构和设置。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于需要了解 ArchSpine 项目顶层配置布局的系统架构师和开发人员。
key_takeaways: 本文档概述了 .spine/config.json 作为主要配置文件的作用。
它明确了与定义镜像系统配置结构相关的职责。
操作细节和具体参数值不在本文档的讨论范围内。
